summary.zh: Windows 上的命令执行说明会自动识别可用的 PowerShell 版本，并提示相应语法，减少因 PowerShell 版本差异导致的命令不兼容。
summary.en: On Windows, command guidance now detects the available PowerShell version and shows compatible syntax guidance, reducing version-specific command issues.

title.zh: Windows PowerShell 语法提示更准确

summary.zh: Hana 会在构建命令工具时识别系统是否安装 PowerShell 7；可用时提示现代语法，只有 Windows PowerShell 5.1 时会提醒避免不兼容的语法。
summary.en: When command tools are built, Hana detects whether PowerShell 7 is installed; it highlights modern syntax when available and warns about incompatible syntax when only Windows PowerShell 5.1 is present.

sources.title: feat(exec-command): bake detected PowerShell flavor into win32 tool description
